  -i, --input-assembly                   Required. Path to the assembly that
                                         contains the types which should be
                                         transpiled.

  -r, --include-referenced-assemblies    Set this flag to enable transpilation
                                         of root types declared in referenced
                                         assemblies.

  -p, --platform                         (Default: System.Text.Json) Target
                                         platform for the code transpilation,
                                         will output different type/valued
                                         conversions depending on the target
                                         platform.

  -o, --output-directory                 Required. Path to the output directory.

  --help                                 Display this help screen.

  --version                              Display version information.

options.description: Path to the assembly that contains the types which should be transpiled.
Set this flag to enable transpilation of root types declared in referenced assemblies.
Target platform for the code transpilation, will output different type/valued conversions depending on the target platform.
